name: File CFPB consumer complaint
summary: Route a financial-product complaint to the CFPB's consumer complaint database.

evidence.claim: CFPB's complaint portal at consumerfinance.gov/complaint accepts complaints about credit cards, mortgages, debt collection, credit reports, student loans, bank accounts, and BNPL products. Companies are required to respond within 15 days.

body.description: Draft a complaint narrative with the user's details, the financial product, and the alleged violation. CFPB publishes complaint summaries publicly (the CFPB Consumer Complaint Database) — increasing public pressure on the company.

prerequisites.description: User has named the financial product/service
User has named the company (or the company can be inferred from the product)

fields.narrative: On {date}, I {interaction}. The company {company} engaged in {alleged_violation}. This appears to violate {regulation_cited}. I have attempted to resolve directly by {resolution_attempts} with {outcome}. I am seeking {remedy_sought}.

successSignals.description: CFPB requires company response within 15 days
Higher-tier complaints escalated to CFPB casework
